question.text: How many times in a financial year must Mutual Funds/AMCs conduct a comprehensive cyber audit?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Mutual Funds/AMCs are mandated to conduct comprehensive cyber audit at least 2 times in a financial year. **The Trap:** Many compliance activities are annual, but cyber audits require semi-annual frequency. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Along with cyber audit reports, MD/CEO must certify compliance with all SEBI cyber security circulars.
